zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Haliburton於1358年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓時，她的父親Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton44歲，母親Margaret Cameron39歲。她於1371年與Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1400年在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Haliburton于1358年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓时，她的父亲Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton44岁，母亲Margaret Cameron39岁。她于1371年与Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1400年在英国苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Haliburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Halliburton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Haliburton in Berwickshire.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Haliburton was born in 1358, in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton, was 44 and her mother, Margaret Cameron, was 39. She married Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney in 1371, in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1400, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Haliburton est née en 1358, à Dirleton, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cameron, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney en 1371, à Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1400, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Haliburton 1358 in Dirleton, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret Cameron 39. Sie hat 1371 in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1400 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Haliburtonが1358年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンで生まれた時，父Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirletonは44歳，母Margaret Cameronは39歳であった。1371年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアディルレトンでHenry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1400年にイギリススコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Haliburton(이)가 1358년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Cameron(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1371년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 디를레턴에서 Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Haliburton nasceu em 1358, em Dirleton, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cameron, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney em 1371, em Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Haliburton родилась в 1358 г. в местности дирлетон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cameron, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney в 1371 г. в местности дирлетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1400 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

Se casó con Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney en 1371, en Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas.
